title: Presence Footsteps Modded Support
description: Texture packs that adds Presence Footsteps support to Team Abnormals and Alex's Caves mods
body:
Add support with [presence footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) with the following mods:

- Neapolitan
- Caverns and Chasms
- Alex's Caves
- Atmospheric
- Farmer's Delight
- Environmental
- Jaden's Nether Expansion
- Spawn
- Species
- Nirvana
- Supplementaries

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ODQPjSh2zjw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Support for every mod listed [here](https://github.com/thelegitdolt/dolt-modpack-how/blob/main/mods.txt) is planned.
